summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Real-Time Fake News Detection System with Neo4j graph database. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend UI and D3.js graph visualization working excellently (95% success). System correctly identifies fake vs trustworthy articles, displays beautiful interactive knowledge graphs, and provides comprehensive statistics.
passed_tests: Analyze Fake Article - Correctly scored 71.0 as LIKELY FAKE
Analyze Trustworthy Article - Correctly scored 2.0 as LIKELY TRUE
Get Graph Data - Returns 218 nodes and 230 links for D3.js
Get Statistics - Returns node counts, verdict distribution, suspicious sources
Get History - Returns analysis history correctly
Invalid Request Handling - Properly rejects short articles
Frontend App Loading - All components load correctly
Navigation - All nav buttons (Analyze, History, Stats, Graph) work
Theme Toggle - Dark/light mode switching works
Analysis Panel - Input fields and example buttons work
Results Panel - Score gauge, verdict badge, explanations display correctly
D3.js Graph Visualization - Interactive graph with zoom, drag, tooltips
History Panel - Shows analysis records after performing analysis
Stats Panel - Displays verdict distribution and source credibility
Entity Extraction - spaCy extracts organizations, persons, locations, topics
Pattern Detection - Cypher queries detect suspicious patterns correctly
